description.value:
Send Medication prescription vvv-geaccepteerdmetwijziging building blocks for patient J. van XXX_Reenen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 23.6b voorschrift t.b.v. VVV <span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙16">TEST Scenarioset 23.6b voorschrift na afhandeling VVV t.b.v. gedeeltelijke overname VVV
Send Medication prescription vvv-geaccepteerdmetwijziging resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '60062') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '114529') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '60062') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '114529') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '60062|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (OMEPRAZOL CAPSULE MSR 20MG)
